since_last: 89% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.98%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 89% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +1.10% · Gold -0.63% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 89% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.98%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.98%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.46%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +4.23%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +4.23%, AMAT +4.01%, ORCL +3.85%, AVAV +3.64%, LRCX +3.33%. Laggards: PUBM -0.88%, AES -0.75%, D -0.36%, CRM -0.18%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.96% at $156.23
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
